name: Linux DO MCP
what_it_does: MCP server for Linux.do — the popular Chinese tech community forum (Discourse-based). Enables AI agents to read posts, search discussions, access technical Q&A content, and interact with the Linux.do community platform. Useful for agents that need to access technical discussions, solutions, and community knowledge from the Chinese tech developer community.
use_cases: Searching Linux.do forum for technical solutions from research agents
Reading community discussions on tech topics from knowledge-gathering agents
Accessing Chinese developer community technical Q&A from information agents
Monitoring Linux.do for relevant technical discussions from community monitoring agents
not_for: Non-Chinese developer communities (use Reddit, Stack Overflow, or Hacker News MCPs for English communities)
Posting or creating content (this appears to be read-focused)
Teams not interested in Chinese tech community perspectives
best_when: A researcher or developer needs to access technical discussions from the Linux.do Chinese developer community — particularly for Linux, open-source, and tech topics discussed in Chinese.
avoid_when: You need English-language technical communities or official documentation — Linux.do is a community forum, not authoritative documentation.

auth.notes: Linux.do API credentials may be required for authenticated access. Community access may work without auth for public content. Check Linux.do API documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free access to public Linux.do content
pricing.notes: Free access to Linux.do community content. MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Content is primarily in Chinese — agents must handle Chinese text or implement translation
Linux.do is a community forum — content quality varies; not authoritative documentation
Community MCP with limited documentation — API coverage may be incomplete
Rate limits from Linux.do may restrict high-frequency agent queries
Niche community tool targeting Chinese Linux/tech community — limited international applicability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public community content. HTTPS. Queries Linux.do servers (China). Content may include links to external resources — validate before following. No sensitive data involved.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public data from Chinese forum. HTTPS. No sensitive data. Be aware of content from community forums — validate sources.
